data.title: Could XRP Dip Towards $1 Before An 'Explosive' Breakout?
data.description: Analysts are observing XRP (CRYPTO: XRP) experiencing range-bound price movements, prompting speculation of a potential pullback before an anticipated breakout. In a recent podcast, Cryptoinsightuk suggested that XRP might dip towards $1 before a significant upward movement, as traders navigate short-term uncertainties amidst a positive long-term outlook. The cryptocurrency is currently consolidating, with its price confined within a wedge formation, indicating the possibility of either a breakout towards higher levels or a sustained downward trend in the near future. There are projections of a potential decline towards $1 by June.

data.title: New Clinical Study Shows Nanodropper Microvolume Delivery Device Provides Superior Efficacy, Fewer Side Effects, and Dramatically Reduces Early Eyedrop Bottle Exhaustion
data.description: In Rochester, Minnesota, on March 25, 2026, Nanodropper shared findings from a recent study. The research revealed that utilizing the Nanodropper adaptor for microvolume eyedrop administration led to substantial reductions in intraocular pressure and fewer negative effects compared to traditional methods. Results from a randomized clinical trial showcased the adaptor's effectiveness in delivering eyedrops, emphasizing its potential benefits for patients.

data.title: Unimarket Partners with Procurated to Add Supplier Performance Intelligence to Enterprise Supplier Management
data.description: In a recent collaboration, Procurated's Canary scoring and review features are now integrated into Unimarket's supplier intelligence solutions. This strategic partnership aims to enhance organizations' ability to make well-informed decisions regarding suppliers. The initiative was launched on March 25, 2026, in Carlsbad, California. Unimarket, renowned for its source-to-pay technology solutions, joined forces with Procurated to bring this innovative integration to the market. This advancement is poised to provide valuable insights to businesses, empowering them to select suppliers more effectively.

data.title: How Workers with Online Degrees and Credentials Stand Out to Hiring Leaders for Current Skills and Workplace Readiness
data.description: A recent survey conducted by The Harris Poll for University of Phoenix revealed that 98% of hiring managers believe that online degrees and other credentials are now more trustworthy compared to ten years ago. Additionally, 78% of these managers stated that individuals holding such credentials exhibit unique and valuable skills for contemporary job roles. This research indicates a growing recognition of the importance and relevance of online education in the current job market. The results provide insights into how hiring leaders perceive the credibility and skills associated with online qualifications.

data.title: Wipfli Announces Continued Partnership with the Philadelphia Eagles
data.description: Milwaukee, WI - On March 25, 2026, Wipfli, a prominent national advisory and accounting firm, revealed the renewal of their enduring collaboration with the Philadelphia Eagles, affirming their position as the team's "Official Accounting Firm". This partnership has spanned over eight years, solidifying Wipfli's integral role within the organization.

data.title: Kroger Helps Customers Fuel Up with 4X Fuel Points Weekends
data.description: Kroger Co. has declared two exclusive events to assist customers in fueling up during the Spring weekends. From March 27 to 29 and April 3 to 5, customers can earn 4X Fuel Points. This initiative aims to provide additional benefits to customers and encourage them to stock up on groceries during these dates.

data.title: Cintas Delivers Record Margins, Raises Outlook
data.description: Cintas Corp (NASDAQ: CTAS) saw a drop in its shares trading, despite surpassing profit expectations, showing strong sales growth, and increasing its full-year forecast. The company's shares are nearing crucial levels. One key reason for this decline is the release of their third-quarter results, showing earnings per share of $1.24, beating the anticipated $1.23. Quarterly sales reached $2.84 billion, marking an 8.9% increase from last year and surpassing the expected $2.821 billion. Organic revenue soared by 8.2% year over year in the quarter. Additionally, gross margin stood at $1.45 billion, a 9.8% rise from the previous year, with the margin expanding by 40 basis points to an all-time high.

data.title: Crypto's Biggest Betrayal: 'Senator Lummis Was On Our Team, Now She's Not,' Mark Yusko Says
data.description: Venture capitalist Mark Yusko has accused Senator Cynthia Lummis (R-Wyo.) of turning her back on the crypto industry after years of support. Yusko labels the Clarity Act settlement on stablecoin yield as regulatory capture instead of the industry clarity it purportedly offers. Describing it as the "Lummis Betrayal," Yusko expressed surprise at Lummis' sudden alignment with the controversial bill, implying external influence. The Clarity Act resolution favors banks at the expense of the crypto sector. Lummis' recent tweet featuring a yield sign was initially perceived as positive for stablecoin yields by investors; however, subsequent reports revealed that the legislation would bar exchanges from providing any yield on stablecoins. Yusko drew parallels between this scenario and the deceptive naming of bills like the Inflation Reduction Act, where the title contradicts the bill's actual impact. The Clarity Act's implications are far from... (The full story is available on Benzinga.com)
